title: Optimize bit operation combination
body:
the verilog like this:

```
always @(*) begin
   for(int j = 0; j < 32; j= j +1) begin
      value[j] = in1_ff[j] & in2_ff[j];
  end
end
```

We want the generated C++ code to look like this:

     value = in1_ff & in2_ff

Combine the same operations as much as possible and cannot be directly translated into bit operations.
